interpretation: The draft evidence chain supports a preliminary reading of the Nazi Volksgemeinschaft as an imagined collective body whose sacred survival justified individual sacrifice.

mechanismSummary: The national body is represented as enduring beyond individual mortality, making bodily sacrifice meaningful as participation in collective survival.
The draft chain identifies a totalizing national symbolic order that organizes belonging, legitimacy, memory, obligation, and sacrifice.
interpretation: The Nazi Volksgemeinschaft is provisionally coded as a very strong symbolic order, while remaining explicitly draft pending verified source passages and broader evidence.
